# HLPR for Ministries

> Done-for-you website design, build, and management for churches, podcasts, and digital ministries. Free 72-hour homepage preview. Live in 14 days. No payment until you approve.

HLPR for Ministries builds modern, mobile-first websites for ministries of all sizes — from local congregations to podcast pastors to digital creator-ministers. Every site is custom-designed, fully managed, and launched in two weeks with a money-back guarantee.

## Pages

- [/](/): Landing page — hero, portfolio, pricing, how it works, founder story, and FAQ.
- [Privacy](/privacy): Privacy policy covering data collection, cookies, SMS/phone communications, and TCPA compliance.
- [Terms](/terms): Terms of service covering acceptable use, service availability, and refund policy.

## Sections on the homepage

- [Portfolio](/#portfolio): Recently launched ministry websites (LifeWork Ministries, Eden Cove, Saved Singles Summit, Dunamis Marketing).
- [Packages](/#pricing): Three tiers — Foundation ($1,500 one-time), Growth ($199/mo), and Established (from $5,000/mo).
- [How It Works](/#how-it-works): 14-day launch process from intake call to live site.
- [Founder](/#founder): Story from Tim Godson, founder of HLPR.
- [FAQ](/#faq): 9 questions covering timeline, content, hosting, digital-only ministries, and offboarding.

## Optional

- [Book a preview](https://links.hlpr.io/widget/booking/gPnL2RU578xVCKw8faDS?utm_source=ministries-lp&utm_medium=cta&utm_campaign=organic): Calendly booking widget for a free homepage preview call.
